name: Bryant Bus Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Anderson County (TN) area schools - unverified
recent_news: No public news found. Address (1190 Hinds Creek Rd, Andersonville TN) sits near another small carrier (Andrea Meyers / USDOT 1937169 at 1184 Hinds Creek Rd); area also hosts Andersonville Bus Lines Inc., a separate operator at 3822 Andersonville Hwy. No M&A signals.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-bus owner-operator in rural East TN. Too small to be a standalone Summit tuck-in; only relevant as a license/route pickup if part of a roll-up of Anderson County micro-operators.

name: SB School Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Bradley County Schools or Cleveland City Schools (TN) area - unverified
recent_news: No public news, website, or M&A activity found. Bradley County Schools and Cleveland City Schools operate the local route systems and use small private contractors; SB School Bus appears to be an individual owner-operator route holder.
fit_notes: Single-bus contractor at sub-scale revenue (~$84K). Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in candidate on its own; only of interest if aggregated with other Bradley/Cleveland independent route holders.

name: Ride-Rite Medi-Van Inc
districts_or_customers: 7D-van student transport for area schools (north-central MA); referenced in Lowell Public Schools transportation materials; NEMT/wheelchair-van services in Worcester/Middlesex
recent_news: No M&A news found. NPI #1407298847 registered as non-emergency medical transport van; Glassdoor posting confirms active 'School Van Driver' hiring out of Westminster, MA, indicating ongoing 7D school van operations.
fit_notes: Small independent 7D-van / SPED / NEMT operator in north-central MA - a market where Summit (via legacy Durham/NELL contracts) is active. Could be a micro tuck-in for special-needs route density around Westminster/Leominster/Lowell, but revenue scale is very small and the NEMT mix dilutes pure school-transport fit.

name: Testerman Bus Svc & Repair
fleet_size_est: small (a handful of buses; member of MD School Bus Contractors Assn cohort)
districts_or_customers: Frederick County Public Schools (MD) - awarded Bid 23T5 for school bus inspections
Wedding/charter work in Mount Airy/Frederick area
recent_news: Awarded Frederick County Public Schools (FCPS) Bid 23T5 for School Bus Inspections (2023) alongside Central MD International Trucks, Colonial Bus, and Mark's Equipment Services. ~31 years in business per BBB/listing data. No M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (30+ years) family-owned MD operator with established FCPS relationship and inspection/repair capability; named owner Debbie Testerman suggests likely succession-stage candidate. Revenue line in source data understates real footprint - worth a direct outreach to confirm fleet size before classifying as too-small. Reasonable micro tuck-in for Summit's MD/Frederick County density.

name: Scrapbook School Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Macomb County, MI area schools - unverified specific district
recent_news: No direct M&A news. Note: surname 'Chynoweth' also appears in the 2024 Federal Register STB filing on Van Pool Transportation LLC's acquisition of Butler's Bus Service (Emo Chynoweth was a Butler's shareholder) - likely a family connection worth confirming but NOT evidence that Scrapbook itself is PE-owned.
fit_notes: Single-bus owner-operator (residential address) at sub-scale revenue. Not a standalone Summit tuck-in. Worth flagging the potential Chynoweth/Butler's Bus family link as a soft data point - if related, the Butler's transaction provides a referral/relationship angle even though Scrapbook itself is too small.
